title: autofs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[5.1.9-13.0.1]
- Add autofs-5.0.5-lookup-mounts.patch [Orabug: 12658280]

[1:5.1.9-13]
- RHEL-90571 - autofs: segfault while dereferencing null mapent [rhel-10]
  - fix handling of ignored offsets.
  - fix invalidated map entry handling in hosts module.
- Resolves: RHEL-90571

[1:5.1.9-12]
- RHEL-87525 - autofs hang - autofs-5.1.4-114.el8_10.2 [rhel-10]
  - fix submount shutdown race.
  - fix deadlock in master_notify_submount().
  - fix lock ordering deadlock in expire_cleanup().
- Resolves: RHEL-87525
full_text:
[5.1.9-13.0.1]
- Add autofs-5.0.5-lookup-mounts.patch [Orabug: 12658280]

[1:5.1.9-13]
- RHEL-90571 - autofs: segfault while dereferencing null mapent [rhel-10]
  - fix handling of ignored offsets.
  - fix invalidated map entry handling in hosts module.
- Resolves: RHEL-90571

[1:5.1.9-12]
- RHEL-87525 - autofs hang - autofs-5.1.4-114.el8_10.2 [rhel-10]
  - fix submount shutdown race.
  - fix deadlock in master_notify_submount().
  - fix lock ordering deadlock in expire_cleanup().
- Resolves: RHEL-87525

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20127-0.html
